prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild arcane library, Natsu Starling in layered blue robes and Natsu Ironleaf in cream and mint robes; both characters raise their hands in a synchronized two-person harmless spell practice, glowing soft mana ribbons swirling between them, readable cooperative body motion, warm wood textures, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous arcane library shot; Natsu Ironleaf gently adjusts her hand position and the soft mana ribbons stabilize into a steady glow between both characters, calm teamwork, no combat harm, no text, no watermark.
